title: The Criminal Code
writer: Martin Flavin, Fred Niblo Jr., Seton I. Miller
actors: Walter Huston, Phillips Holmes, Constance Cummings
plot: After a failed attempt at running for governor, D.A. Mark Brady is appointed warden of the state prison where many of the criminals he prosecuted are incarcerated.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 3 wins & 1 nomination total
